# STRAT.002 ? OODA Loop (Boyd)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** military_strategic
**Domain:** MILITARY_STRATEGIC
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Observe, Orient, Decide, Act cycle; faster loops win; disrupt opponent's loop; continuous iteration; tempo advantage

## Application
Observe situation rapidly; orient through mental models; decide quickly; act decisively; iterate faster than opposition; disrupt their cycle

## Key Values
- Speed
- Iteration
- Disruption
- Tempo
- Continuous cycling

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, military_strategic
